ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the activity in seconds since epoch */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the activity in seconds since epoch */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the activity in kilometers */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Total calories burned during the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., running, walking, cycling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Calorie burn rate for the activity type (calories per hour) */,
  "energy_expenditure" REAL /* Energy expenditure for the activity type (kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location data point */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the location data point belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed at the location in meters per second */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data point in meters */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the location data point in seconds since epoch */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location in meters */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing (direction of travel) at the location in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "route_elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the route in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_points" (
  "route_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route point */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the point belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the point */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the point */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the point on the route */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the point in meters */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain to reach the point in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_points_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time the note was created in seconds since epoch */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., comment, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_notes_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media share */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the share belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform used (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "share_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "shared_at" INTEGER /* Time the post was shared in seconds since epoch */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_shares_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., distance, speed, pace) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., kilometers, meters per second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "target_date" INTEGER /* Target date for achieving the goal in seconds since epoch */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., running, cycling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workout */,
  "workout_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout */,
  "workout_description" TEXT /* Description of the workout */,
  "workout_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the exercise belongs to */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "exercise_description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "exercise_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_exercises_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the device data belongs to */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, wearable) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
